nasb.text: That I may tell of all Your praises, That in the gates of the daughter of Zion I may rejoice in Your salvation.

esv.text: that I may recount all your praises, that in the gates of the daughter of Zion I may rejoice in your salvation.

cnv.text: 好叫我述說你一切可稱頌的事， 並在錫安的城門因你的救恩歡樂。

ccb.text: 我好在锡安的城门口称颂你， 因你的拯救而欢乐。

csbs.text: 好让我讲述对你的一切赞美， 并在锡安城的众门，因你的救恩欢乐。
